title: humboltia dura
intro: Humboldtia dura, also known as the Indian cork tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Olacaceae, native to the Western Ghats of India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Humboldtia dura include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Humboldtia dura can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
